name: kaskade-monorepo
description: Kaskade - Monorepo with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend

scripts.render:build: pnpm install --config.production=false && pnpm --filter @kaskade/backend exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @kaskade/backend exec prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd apps/backend && npx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
